content:
📅 **活动时间**
在4月6日9:00至4月20日9:00期间，幻衣活动「钩吻葬盛」限时开放。

📑 **活动内容**
✦ 活动期间完成任务累计可获得：「无垢之芯」×10、全新1☆幻衣「旺达·钩吻葬盛」。
✦ 活动结束后「旺达·钩吻葬盛」将会上架「幻衣订购」，价格为「源液」×680。

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

📅 **Time**
The "With Spikenard And Myrrh" event runs from <t:1775437200:f> to <t:1776646800:f>. Don't miss out!

📑 **Details**
✦ During the event, Complete the tasks to receive 10 Pure Core and New Wanda Skin (1★) "With Spikenard And Myrrh"!
✦ After the event ends, "Wanda: With Spikenard And Myrrh" (1★) will be available in the "Garment Ordering" shop for Silver Prime ×680.
